raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kamehr ta Deena dsestra
fohp/ un ta Ehna atkahpjahs.
Atgreeſees mans Draugs/ tohpi
ka Stirna/ jeb ka jauns Erschkis
us teem Kalneem Beter.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta III. Nodalla.
1. S mekleju Nakti man-
nā Gulta to/ ko manna
Dwehfele mihle/es mek-
leju/ bet ne atraddu winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "2. Es zelschohs jelle aug-
tcham/ un eefchu Pilsshaftā ap-
kahrt us Gatwehm un Eelahm/
es meklefchu to/ ko manna Dweb-
fele mihle. Es mekleju/ bet ne at-
raddu winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "3. Mann atradde tee Sargi/
las Pilsshaftā apkahrt eet/ ne ef-
tat juhs redſej-chi / ko manna
Dwehfele mihle.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Kad es maſkenibt no teem
biju pagahjis/ tad atraddu es to
ko manna Dwehfele mihle/es tur-
ru winnu / un ne atlaidischu to/
kamehr es winnu weddifchu man-
nas Mahtēs Namnā/ eekſch
tahs Kambara/ kas mannt dsem-
dejſi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Es luhsu juhs tik mihti
juhs Jerusalemes Meitas/ pee
tahm Stirnehm un Erschkū-
Mahtehn Laukā/ ka juhs man-
nu Mthligu ne uſmohdinajat
nedß skubbinaſat / teekams tas
winnae paſchai patihk.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Kurra irr tchi / kas no
Tuſfueſes uskahpj ka Duhnu-
Stabs/ apfwehpinata ar Mirri
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Redſi / ap Salamaſ
Gultu irr fechdetmits Stipr
apkahrt/ no Israëta Stipreen
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee wiſſi turr Sohbixus
ismahziti karroht: Jekatram it
faws Sohbins pee faweem Gu-
neem tahs Bihaſchanas deh
Nakti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Tas Kehniſsch Salaman-
irr few lizzis Schuhpla-Wahgu-
taſſiht no Libbanus Rohkeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Winna Stabbus darrij-
wisch no Sudraba / to Dibbi-
nu no Selta/ to Gehdefli ne-
Purpura/ winnu Eekſch-Buffe-
bija iſpuschkota ar Mihleſtibu-
prett Jerusalemes Meitahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Eita ahra/ un uſluhkojeet
juhs Zianas Meitas to Kehniſu-
Salamanu/ ar to Krohni/ ar fo
wiſſa Mahte to frohneja fawāg
Kahsu Deenās/ un tai Deena-
tawas Sirde Prezibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta IV. Nodalla.
1. Augi/ tu eſti ſkaista
manna Draudsene /
ſrangi/ tu eſti ſkaista/
tawas Azzis irr ka Balloſchu
(Azzis)/ starp tawahm Bifehm.
Tawi Matti irr ka weens Kaſu
gannamajs Pulks/ kas zirptas
irr uhs to Kalnu Gilead.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "2. Tawi Sohbi irr ka kahds
gannams (Awju) Pulks / kas
zirptas irr/ kas no Peldeſchanas
angſcham nahk / kas wiſſi
Dwihnas weddahs/ un neweena
starp winnahm irr ne-augliga.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
